name: conditional-304
title: Conditional QUERY — 304 Not Modified
description: A client re-issues an identical QUERY carrying If-None-Match with the validator from an earlier 200 (e.g. fixture 01). The selected representation is unchanged, so the server returns 304 with no body, exactly as it would for a conditional GET on the equivalent resource (RFC 10008 §2.6; §4.7). A 304 carries no message body, so there is no envelope to validate.
